settings.title: Settings
settings.markAsReadOnScrollDesc: Automatically mark articles as read when the title scrolls past the top of the list.
settings.removeScrollReadInUnreadMode: Immediately remove scroll-read articles in unread mode
settings.removeScrollReadInUnreadModeDesc: When enabled, articles marked as read by scrolling in 'Show Unread' mode are immediately removed from the list. When disabled, they remain visible until re-entering the feed.
settings.translationDesc: Translate article content using the browser's built-in Google Translate.
settings.translationSourceLanguage: Source language (optional, leave blank for auto-detect)
settings.translationNote: The free translation service has rate limits. If translation fails, please try again later.
settings.defaultArticleFilterDesc: The default article filter mode when opening or refreshing the page.
settings.articleTitleLinesDesc: Maximum lines to display for each article title in the list.
settings.articleExcerptLinesDesc: Maximum lines to display for each article excerpt in the list.

sidebar.confirmDeleteFeed: Are you sure you want to delete this feed? This cannot be undone and all related articles will also be deleted.
sidebar.confirmDeleteFolder: Are you sure you want to delete this folder? Its feeds will be moved to uncategorized.
sidebar.deleteFeedFailed: Failed to delete feed, please try again later
sidebar.deleteFolderFailed: Failed to delete folder, please try again later

articleReader.noTranslatableContent: No translatable content in this article
articleReader.translationFailed: Translation failed, please try again later

addFeed.title: Add new feed
addFeed.description: Enter an RSS feed URL to add a new subscription

editFeed.title: Edit feed
editFeed.description: Modify the feed name and URL
editFeed.nameUrlRequired: Please enter the feed name and URL
editFeed.saveFailed: Failed to save, please try again later
editFeed.fullContentFetchDesc: When opened, automatically fetch the full content from the original webpage (useful for feeds that only provide a summary).
editFeed.authHeaderDesc: Sent as the Authorization HTTP header when fetching this feed. Use this when the feed is behind a reverse proxy that requires a JWT or API key.

addFolder.title: New folder
addFolder.description: Enter a folder name to organize feeds
addFolder.createFailed: Failed to create folder, please try again

renameFolder.title: Rename folder
renameFolder.renameFailed: Failed to rename, please try again

importExport.title: Import / Export Feeds
importExport.description: Import or export feeds in OPML format
importExport.importDesc: Select a local OPML file to import multiple feeds at once.
importExport.exportDesc: Export all feeds as an OPML file for backup or migration to another RSS reader.
importExport.importFailed: Import failed, please try again later.
importExport.exportFailed: Export failed, please try again later.
importExport.noValidFeeds: No valid feeds found in the OPML file.

storage.title: Storage Management
storage.cleanup30Desc: Delete articles older than 30 days (starred kept)
storage.cleanup90Desc: Delete articles older than 90 days (starred kept)
storage.cleanup180Desc: Delete articles older than 180 days (starred kept)
storage.cleanup365Desc: Delete articles older than 365 days (starred kept)
storage.confirmCleanup:
Are you sure you want to delete articles older than {{days}} days?

Note:
- Starred articles will not be deleted
- This action cannot be undone
- Storage will be freed
storage.cleanupSuccess: Successfully deleted {{count}} articles, freeing up storage
storage.cleanupFailed: Failed to clean up data, please try again later
storage.note1: Starred articles will not be deleted
storage.note3: Storage will be freed after cleanup
storage.note4: Regular cleanup is recommended to maintain performance
